productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men White Swank Briefs
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs lives up to the brand's ideals. Its stylish waistband and double layered front give you a body enhancing fit. Product DetailsWhite tanga style brief which comes with optimum front coverage and maximum back coverage, black elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front for extra support and comfort, grey melange binding at leg hole, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritationMaterial and Care96% cotton and 4% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
